userMessage: Production test: reset scope, set CH1 1V DC CH2 500mV AC, edge trigger CH1 rising 1V, average 64 waveforms, add frequency amplitude pk2pk overshoot on CH1, query all results, error check, save setup waveform and screenshot

actionsJson.summary: Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.
findings: Assistant returned JSON that did not fully map to valid TekAutomate steps, so invalid apply actions were removed.
suggestedFixes: Use only real TekAutomate step types and schema-valid actions. Removed invalid items: actions[0].steps[18]: invalid recallType
